note_families.summary: FS Brands incorporated March 31, 2010. 97.18% owned by FS Property Services (U.S.) Inc., indirect 100% sub of FirstService Corporation (publicly traded). Subsidiaries: CertaPro, Paul Davis, California Closets, Pillar To Post, Floor Coverings International. Controls 22 California Closet, 23 Paul Davis, 3 CertaPro franchises.

sub_policies.detail: Initial franchise fees deferred over franchise agreement term (5-10 years). Royalties recognized on contracted % of franchisee revenue. Admin/support services recognized as provided.
Contributions reported as revenue consistent with royalty timing. Expenditures reported as expenses when incurred. Excess accrued as unearned revenue.
Percentage of completion based on ratio of actual to estimated costs.
Investments <3 months maturity. Money market and time deposits at cost.
Cash restricted for marketing fund use.
FIFO, lower of cost and NRV. Finished products, accessories, painting kits, film, supplies.
Straight-line depreciation. Leasehold improvements over lesser of useful life or lease term.
Not amortized. Tested annually Aug 1 or when indicators exist. Market multiple of EBITDA method.
Customer relationships 4-20 yrs, Trademarks 15-30 yrs, Franchise agreements pattern of use. Straight-line amortization.
Review if indicators exist. Undiscounted cash flow test, then fair value.
Payments for future services. Customer deposits for California Closet installations.
Subsidiary employees compensated on notional value increase. 10-year term, 5-year vesting. Based on earnings growth vs fixed threshold.
ASC 842. Separate lease and non-lease components. Short-term leases (<12 months) excluded from ROU. Straight-line expense.
Asset/liability method. Deferred assets/liabilities at enacted rates. Valuation allowance if realization not more likely than not.
Redeemable securities at greater of redemption amount or initial recorded amount. Recorded in mezzanine (outside equity).
Credit risk limited by customer base dispersion. Write-offs $2,968,464 in 2024 ($1,325,985 in 2023).
Purchase method. Transaction costs expensed. Contingent consideration at fair value, re-measured each period.

note_families.detail: Franchise fee revenue recognized in 2024 from beginning deferred: $7,588,809 ($5,558,367 in 2023). Fees recognized over 5-10 year agreement life. Capitalized broker/sales commissions: $12,683,884 ($11,417,250 in 2023), amortized $3,419,647 in 2024.

Management fees to FirstService: $7,540,176 ($6,772,822 in 2023). Note receivable from FirstService Restoration: $7,232,377. Intercompany payable to FirstService: $21,744,502 ($23,166,961 in 2023) for acquisitions/interest.

From franchisees for fees/royalties. Interest rates nil% to 8%, unsecured, monthly installments. NCI amounts: $473,038 at 2.5%. Total $10,134,810. Maturities: 2025 $754K, 2026 $7,820K, 2027 $410K, 2028 $246K, 2029 $37K, thereafter $867K.
Production equipment 5-7 yrs, Vehicles 5 yrs, Furniture 5-7 yrs, Computers 3-5 yrs, Leasehold improvements lease term. Net PP&E: $64,308,483. Depreciation: $19,418,258 ($19,480,882 in 2023).

Trademarks net $3,130,379, Franchise agreements net $11,569,046, Customer relationships net $19,287,342, Non-compete/other net $1,112,963. Total net $35,099,730. Amortization: $7,852,638 ($9,707,496 in 2023). 5-year amort schedule disclosed.
Beginning $135,209,812. Additions from 2024 acquisitions $1,912,611. Measurement period adjustments $57,536. Ending $137,179,959. No impairment in 2024 (quantitative assessment).

ROU assets $65,005,041 ($61,114,454 in 2023). Current lease liabilities $14,387,139. Non-current lease liabilities $56,742,291. Lease expense $17,779,814 ($16,009,791 in 2023). Cash paid $17,012,025 ($15,463,416 in 2023). New ROU: $18,924,068 ($11,605,523 in 2023). Weighted avg remaining term 6.2 years. Weighted avg discount rate 4.7%. Maturity: 2025 $16.6M, 2026 $14.6M, 2027 $12.4M, 2028 $10.0M, 2029 $11.3M, thereafter $25.5M, total undiscounted $84.9M.

Statutory rate 26.5%, effective rate 27.9%. Tax provision $23,297,857 ($17,567,609 in 2023). Current federal $18,404,257, state $5,723,660. Deferred recovery ($830,060). Deferred tax assets: accrued expenses $8,120K, bad debt $797K, tax losses $3,315K. Deferred tax liabilities: goodwill/intangibles $10,005K, PP&E $11,116K. Net deferred liability $10,949,640. Valuation allowance $1,320,462.
AR increase ($24,534K), inventories decrease $2,197K, prepaid increase ($8,364K), AP increase $11,187K, taxes increase $989K. Total change ($15,242,704).

Beginning $66,979,653. Share of earnings $2,463,477. Redemption increment $5,093,012. Distributions ($2,692,391). Purchases ($675,508). Sales $1,308,785. Ending $72,477,028. Put/call formula price based on EBITDA multiple. Settlement in cash or parent shares.
Notes receivable: carrying $10,134,810, fair value $8,664,270. Contingent consideration: $3,983,042 (Level 3 inputs). Cash, AR, AP at carrying value due to short-term maturity.

2024: 4 CertaPro franchises (Long Beach CA, McHenry IL, Palatine IL, Schaumburg IL) + 1 Paul Davis (Aurora CO). Total consideration $3,497,914 (cash $2,992K + contingent $506K). Acquired intangibles $1,547K, goodwill $1,913K. 2023: 7 acquisitions, total consideration $23,651,435. None of the 2024-2025 acquisitions were Pillar To Post.
ASU 2024-03 (income statement expense disaggregation, effective Jan 2027). ASU 2023-09 (income tax disclosures, effective Jan 2025). Both under assessment.

key_observations: No Pillar To Post-specific acquisitions in 2024 or 2023 — acquisition activity focused on CertaPro and Paul Davis
NCI redemption amount ($72.5M) based on EBITDA multiples — indicates significant subsidiary value
Advertising fund contributions flow through revenue — matching Brand Fee with corresponding expense
Lease obligations: $84.9M undiscounted maturity schedule, 6.2 yr weighted average term
No going-concern indicators. No goodwill impairment.
Intercompany payable to FirstService declining ($21.7M from $23.2M) — parent funding being repaid
First dividend in recent history: $30M paid in 2024
